MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-28-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-28-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

David J. Foran, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Golden Gate Center, a Limited Partnership.
Mey Xiao, Accountant for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Siu Kuen Kwan, a/k/a Candice Kwan.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on July 10, 2008.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Golden Gateway Center Lease dated 8/1/07---------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Notice to Pay Rent or Quit-----------------------------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Golden Gate Center, a Limited Partnership, and against defendant Siu Kuen Kwan, a/k/a Candice Kwan as follows:

Plaintiff Golden Gate Center, a Limited Partnership shall recover from defendant Siu Kuen Kwan, a/k/a Candice Kwan Rent/Per Diem Damages in the amount of $5,558.18, for a Total Judgment in the amount of $5,558.18.

Plaintiff Golden Gate Center, a Limited Partnership is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 550 Battery Street, #2203, San Francisco, CA 94111. The lease is forfeited.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-24-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joseph Sacramento, Esq., for plaintiff Golden Gateway Center. Oetomo Joriamto was present with authority for plaintiff.
Defendant did not appear.

Settlement Conference ordered off calendar: Defendant not present. Trial remains on calendar. Hon. William R. Gargano. Clerk: Garth Sayers. Not reported. (218)
